name: adhd-federated
description: ADHD phase-0 scaffold for federated control-plane and host-node orchestration

scripts.phase0:verify: node scripts/health-check.mjs && node scripts/check-schemas.mjs && node scripts/check-compatibility.mjs
scripts.phase7:verify: npm run phase6:verify && npm run compat:check
scripts.phase8:verify: npm run phase7:verify && node --test test/workflow-store.test.js test/host-api.test.js test/federation-api.test.js
scripts.phase9:verify: npm run phase8:verify && node scripts/health-check.mjs --mode=both && node scripts/runtime-smoke.mjs
scripts.phase10:verify: npm run phase9:verify && npm run docs:lint
